check_whether_a_stated_claim_is_supporte: Check whether a stated claim is supported by Wikipedia content and flag unsupported claims.
enter_wikipedia_page_title_e_g_python_pr: Enter Wikipedia page title (e.g., "Python programming language")...
integrate_wikipedia_into_the_workflow_ca: Integrate Wikipedia into the workflow. Can get page summary, search pages, get page content, and get random page.
resolve_an_ambiguous_name_to_the_correct: Resolve an ambiguous name to the correct Wikipedia entity using surrounding context.
search_and_retrieve_content_from_wikiped: Search and retrieve content from Wikipedia
search_wikipedia_for_a_topic_and_assembl: Search Wikipedia for a topic and assemble a concise, sourced background brief.
